results.name: 2000-POST-TRANSACTION
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN02C.cbl
Program: CBTRN02C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 2000-POST-TRANSACTION (lines 424-445)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA01Y
Calls: PERFORM 2700-UPDATE-TCATBAL, PERFORM 2800-UPDATE-ACCOUNT-REC, PERFORM 2900-WRITE-TRANSACTION-FILE, PERFORM Z-GET-DB2-FORMAT-TIMESTAMP
results.summary: paragraph 2000-POST-TRANSACTION in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 2700-UPDATE-TCATBAL, PERFORM 2800-UPDATE-ACCOUNT-REC, PERFORM 2900-WRITE-TRANSACTION-FILE, PERFORM Z-GET-DB2-FORMAT-TIMESTAMP. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
2000-POST-TRANSACTION.                                                   
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-ID            TO    TRAN-ID                           
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-TYPE-CD       TO    TRAN-TYPE-CD                      
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-CAT-CD        TO    TRAN-CAT-CD                       
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-SOURCE        TO    TRAN-SOURCE                       
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-DESC          TO    TRAN-DESC                         
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-AMT           TO    TRAN-AMT                          
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-MERCHANT-ID   TO    TRAN-MERCHANT-ID                  
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-MERCHANT-NAME TO    TRAN-MERCHANT-NAME                
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-MERCHANT-CITY TO    TRAN-MERCHANT-CITY                
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-MERCHANT-ZIP  TO    TRAN-MERCHANT-ZIP                 
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-CARD-NUM      TO    TRAN-CARD-NUM                     
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-ORIG-TS       TO    TRAN-ORIG-TS                      
           PERFORM Z-GET-DB2-FORMAT-TIMESTAMP                                   
           MOVE  DB2-FORMAT-TS          TO    TRAN-PROC-TS                      
                                                                                
           PERFORM 2700-UPDATE-TCATBAL                                          
           PERFORM 2800-UPDATE-ACCOUNT-REC                                      
           PERFORM 2900-WRITE-TRANSACTION-FILE                                  
                                                                                
           EXIT.
